headline: Why The Story Around Simon Property Group (SPG) Is Shifting After Mixed Analyst And News Updates
summary: Simon Property Group’s latest fair value estimate has been updated to US$208.55 from US$206.30, a modest move that keeps the price target broadly in line with prior assumptions. This tweak sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst views, where some highlight healthier mall metrics and others focus on interest costs and more cautious valuation stances after the recent run in mall REITs. As you read on, you will see how these shifting inputs shape the evolving narrative around Simon and what to...
